ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job category */,
  "industry_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry sector */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary for jobs in this category */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of jobs in this category over the years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_categories_industry_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_sector_id") REFERENCES industry_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the employment data */,
  "job_openings" INTEGER /* Number of job openings in that year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for job openings in that year */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the job category in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "unemployment_rate_latest" REAL /* Latest unemployment rate for the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for jobs in this sector */,
  "job_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of jobs in this sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education requirement */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* The educational degree level required (e.g., Associate, Bachelor, Master) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study pertinent to the job */,
  "years_of_experience_required" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required */,
  "certification_required" TEXT /* Any specific certification required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_requirements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unemployment rate entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the unemployment rate data */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate expressed as a percentage */,
  "employed_population" INTEGER /* Number of employed people in the region */,
  "unemployed_population" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed people in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company posting the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job posting */,
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job type */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for job applications */,
  "is_remote" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job is remote or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_type_id") REFERENCES job_type ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment data entry */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Feedback comment from the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., accuracy, relevance, suggestion) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES employment_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, job seeker, educator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (view, download, etc.) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string providing information about the user's browser and device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of the skill required (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the skill is mandatory for the job category */,
  "certification_required" TEXT /* Any specific certification required for the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_type" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type (e.g., Full-time, Part-time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  "is_full_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job type is full-time */,
  "is_remote_friendly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job type is remote-friendly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
